description: Create a content slide on the value of innovation with a two-column layout: a horizontal bar chart of medium-sized firms using selected digital technologies in Germany and a vertical bar chart of the EU27+UK data economy value, plus a right-side callout panel.

header.headline: Companies predominantly use digital technologies that can exploit and process data driving further growth of the data economy

left.title: Share of medium sized firms using selected digital technologies, example Germany, 2021 [%]

center.title: Value of the data economy, EU27 + UK [EUR bn]

items.text: Companies increasingly use data-driven technologies, with cloud data and big data analytics showing the highest adoption among medium-sized firms.
The data economy in the EU27 + UK is expected to grow strongly from 2020 to 2025.
Data management capabilities underpin the broader adoption of advanced digital technologies.
